name: Cheesy Grits
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped green chiles, or picante sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bring water to a boil in a heavy saucepan.
3. Stir in grits. Return to boil, then reduce heat and partially cover.
4. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add cheese gradually until it melts. Stir in margarine and chiles.
6. Whisk egg yolk with milk and stir into the grits.
7. Whip egg white until stiff and fold into the grits.
8. Pour mixture into a 5 x 5-inch casserole dish sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
9. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted comes out clean. Remove from oven and let stand 5 minutes before cutting.
2 servings/Serving size: 1 cup
Exchanges: All breakfast menus this week have 350 calories total and include:
2 Starch servings
1 Fruit serving
1 Skim Milk serving
1 Fat serving
In some menus, one Meat serving has been used in place of either the Skim Milk serving or one of the Starch servings.
